params.name: The Key of Solomon
params.description:
On Mar 31, 323 BC, Alexander cut open the lock that kept the treasure of King Solomon.
The legendary Key of Solomon could unlock King Solomon's treasure, but was later destroyed at the hands of Alexander, the "conquering king." Therefore, the 72 spirits sealed inside the vessel by King Solomon could not enter our world, and the sword of Damocles that hung over the heads of rulers vanished forever.
